title: Literary Analysis
description: Theme, voice, point of view, symbolism, narrative structure.
summary_pt_br: Análise literária: tema, voz, ponto de vista, simbolismo, estrutura narrativa.

scenes.subtitle_en: Theme, voice, point of view, symbolism, narrative structure.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Análise literária: tema, voz, ponto de vista, simbolismo, estrutura narrativa.

scenes.text_en: Theme, voice, point of view, symbolism, narrative structure. Focus: literary analysis. The novel's central theme is the cost of silence.
scenes.text_pt: Análise literária: tema, voz, ponto de vista, simbolismo, estrutura narrativa. Foco: literary analysis. O tema central do romance é o custo do silêncio.

scenes.title: Literary Analysis
scenes.body_en: Central moves: identify THEME, analyze VOICE (first/third), trace POV shifts, decode SYMBOLISM, map NARRATIVE STRUCTURE (linear/fragmented/cyclical).
scenes.body_pt: Análise literária: tema, voz, ponto de vista, simbolismo, estrutura narrativa.

examples.en: The novel's central theme is the cost of silence.
examples.pt: O tema central do romance é o custo do silêncio.

examples.en: First-person voice creates an intimacy the plot later betrays.
examples.pt: A primeira pessoa cria uma intimidade que a trama depois trai.

examples.en: The recurring rain functions as a symbol of unspoken grief.
examples.pt: A chuva recorrente funciona como símbolo de luto não dito.

exercise.question: Complete: "The ___ central theme is the cost of silence."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The novel's central theme is the cost of silence."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O tema central do romance é o custo do silêncio.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: First-person voice creates an intimacy the plot later betrays.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "First-person voice creates an intimacy the plot later betrays."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A primeira pessoa cria uma intimidade que a trama depois trai.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Literary Analysis — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre literary analysis. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Open your analysis with the central theme.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The novel explores the cost of inherited silence.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What voice does the author choose?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The narrative moves in fragments, not chronologically.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Close with a thesis about meaning.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Form and theme mirror each other perfectly.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Literary analysis rewards patient, re-reading eyes.

scenes.title: The literature circle
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Analyze the novel. Use at least three literary terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In Dona Lúcia's living room, the monthly literature circle gathered around an ambitious new novel.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: The novel's central theme is the cost of silence inherited across three generations of one family.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: The first-person voice is intimate and unreliable — it creates trust the plot then deliberately betrays.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: The recurring rain serves as a symbol for grief the characters never speak aloud to one another.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: Its fragmented structure mirrors the memory itself — circular, non-linear, almost anti-narrative in design.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Literary analysis, Lúcia taught patiently, is not about finding answers — it's about asking better questions of the text.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Literary Analysis". Theme, voice, point of view, symbolism, narrative structure. The novel's central theme is the cost of silence. First-person voice creates an intimacy the plot later betrays. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Literary Analysis". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
